title: Spokeishere Totem
description: A red-and-black high-contrast totem inspired by SpokeIsHere’s aggressive PvP style.
body:
## SpokeIsHere Totem
A bold dark red/black PvP-style totem inspired by SpokeIsHere, featuring aggressive shading and strong contrast.

### Features
- Red + black palette
- Sharp shading

### Allowed
- Personal edits
- Use in videos or streams

### Not Allowed
- Reuploads
- Selling
- Claiming the texture
